crm_implementation.heading: Our CRM Implementation Services
crm_implementation.subtitle: End-to-end CRM implementation services built for reliability, clarity, and adoption.

services.title: CRM Setup & Configuration
services.description: We configure pipelines, fields, permissions, and workflows to match real sales, marketing, and operational processes. No unnecessary complexity. No unused features.

services.title: CRM Data Migration & Cleanup
services.description: We migrate data from spreadsheets, legacy CRMs, and internal systems while removing duplicates, fixing structure issues, and validating accuracy.

services.title: Workflow & Automation Implementation
services.description: We implement automation for lead routing, follow-ups, task creation, notifications, and lifecycle stages, reducing manual work and missed actions.

services.title: CRM Integration Implementation
services.description: We integrate your CRM with marketing platforms, finance systems, customer support tools, analytics, and internal software to create a single source of truth.

services.title: Dashboards & Reporting Setup
services.description: We design role-based dashboards for sales reps, managers, operations, and leadership, ensuring reporting is trusted and actionable.

services.title: User Access & Security Configuration
services.description: We implement access controls, approval flows, and data visibility rules that balance security with operational efficiency.

erp.heading: Our ERP Services
erp.subtitle: End to end ERP services covering strategy, implementation, integration, and optimisation.

services.title: ERP Strategy & System Selection
services.description: We help you select the right ERP based on your operational needs, industry, and growth plans. No vendor bias, no over buying.

services.title: ERP Implementation
services.description: We implement ERP systems with a structured, phased approach that prioritises adoption, accuracy, and minimal disruption.

services.title: ERP Customisation & Configuration
services.description: We configure modules, workflows, permissions, and reporting to reflect how your teams actually operate, not generic templates.

services.title: ERP Data Migration & Validation
services.description: We migrate financial, operational, and historical data with strict validation to ensure accuracy and continuity.

services.title: ERP Integration Services
services.description: We integrate ERP systems with CRMs, finance tools, eCommerce platforms, warehouses, and custom software to create a single operational view.

services.title: ERP Optimisation & Support
services.description: We optimise existing ERP systems that are slow, underused, or misaligned with current operations.

crm_customization.heading: Our CRM Customisation Services
crm_customization.subtitle: We customise CRM platforms to improve efficiency, visibility, and adoption.

services.title: Workflow & Process Customisation
services.description: We tailor pipelines, stages, approvals, and automations to reflect how deals actually move through your business.

services.title: Custom Fields & Data Models
services.description: We design structured data models that support accurate reporting, forecasting, and segmentation.

services.title: CRM Automation & Business Rules
services.description: We implement automation for follow ups, task creation, deal progression, alerts, and internal handoffs.

services.title: Custom Dashboards & Reporting
services.description: We build dashboards that leadership actually trusts, with real time visibility into sales, pipeline health, and performance.

services.title: Role Based Access & Permissions
services.description: We configure access levels so each team sees what they need, nothing more, nothing less.

services.title: CRM UI & Usability Enhancements
services.description: We simplify layouts, forms, and views to reduce friction and improve day to day usage.

crm_integration.heading: Our CRM Integration Services
crm_integration.subtitle: We integrate CRMs with internal systems, third party platforms, and custom software.

services.title: Marketing Automation Integration
services.description: Connect your CRM with marketing platforms to ensure leads, attribution, and engagement data flow cleanly between teams.

services.title: Sales & Pipeline Integration
services.description: Integrate quoting tools, proposal systems, call tracking, and deal management platforms directly into the CRM.

services.title: ERP & Finance Integration
services.description: Sync invoices, payments, contracts, and financial data for accurate forecasting and revenue reporting.

services.title: Customer Support & Helpdesk Integration
services.description: Unify sales and support data by integrating ticketing systems, live chat, and customer service platforms.

services.title: Custom API & System Integrations
services.description: We build secure, scalable integrations for proprietary systems, internal tools, and legacy software.

services.title: Data Synchronisation & Automation
services.description: Ensure consistent, real time updates across systems with controlled data logic and conflict handling.

crm_automation_ai.heading: Our CRM Automation & AI Services
crm_automation_ai.subtitle: We design automation and AI around real workflows, not generic templates.

services.title: Sales Workflow Automation
services.description: Automate lead routing, task creation, deal stage updates, follow ups, and handovers between sales roles.

services.title: Marketing & Lead Nurture Automation
services.description: Trigger campaigns, score leads, and sync engagement data automatically inside the CRM.

services.title: AI Lead Scoring & Prioritisation
services.description: Use AI models to identify high intent leads and prioritise sales effort where it matters.

services.title: AI Assisted Forecasting & Reporting
services.description: Improve pipeline accuracy with AI driven insights based on historical data and live activity.

services.title: Customer Lifecycle Automation
services.description: Automate onboarding, renewals, upsells, and churn prevention workflows.

services.title: Data Hygiene & Enrichment Automation
services.description: Automatically clean, deduplicate, and enrich CRM records to maintain data integrity.
